"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2020.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\proj01.dir/objects.a
D:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\proj01.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\proj01.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\proj01.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o proj01.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libproj01.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\proj01.dir\linklibs.rsp
